debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f✝ : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
x : H
⊢ ∀ (x_1 y : H),
    ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x (x_1 + y)) f =
      ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x x_1) f +
        ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f

failed_attempts:
by
    intro x₁ x₂
    ext y
    simp only [LinearMap.mkContinuous_apply, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk]
    have hμ : cfc_toComplexMeasure ha (x₁ + x₂) y = cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x₁ y + cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x₂ y := by
      simp only [cfc_toComplexMeasure]
      rw [← map_add]
      congr 1; ext; simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.add_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply,
        cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply, inner_add_left]
    rw [hμ, ComplexMeasure.integral_add] <;>
      apply hf_measurable.integrable_of_bound (integrable_const C) (eventually_of_forall hf_bounded)
  map_smul' := by
    intro c x
    ext y
    simp only [LinearMap.mkContinuous_apply, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, RingHom.id_apply]
    have hμ : cfc_toComplexMeasure ha (c • x) y = (star c) • cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y := by
      simp only [cfc_toComplexMeasure]
      rw [← map_smul]
      congr 1; ext; simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply,
        cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply, inner_smul_left]
    rw [hμ, ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
